findings: Brand lockups and surface styling were inconsistent between marketing, auth, desktop, and mobile views.
The login page felt visually disconnected from the premium positioning established on the landing page.
Header treatments duplicated bespoke markup instead of using a shared system.
implementedChanges: Added shared premium shell, panel, button, proof-card, and brand-lockup styles in globals.
Refined the landing hero with a stronger lockup, proof cards, upgraded CTA styling, and more deliberate screenshot framing.
Reworked the login page and login form to match the premium brand language and improve first-use trust.
Aligned the desktop navbar and mobile header to the same WOT brand system.
